title: Syngonanthus nitens
taxonomy: Syngonanthus nitens is a member of the family Eriocaulaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as pipeworts. Eriocaulaceae is part of the larger monocot clade, and is often classified as part of the order Poales. The order Poales is a diverse group of flowering plants that also includes grasses and bromeliads. Syngonanthus nitens, therefore, is a part of the broader plant kingdom.

intro: Syngonanthus nitens is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae, commonly known as a type of "pipeplant". The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce oxidative stress.
